# cmccloudv2_rds_cluster_database (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cmccloudv2_rds_cluster_database" "database1" {
    cluster_id    = "095c0455-23ed-455c-b477-1be7515a31c2"
    name          = "dbprod"
    character_set = "utf8mb4"
    collation     = "utf8mb4_unicode_ci"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) RdsCluster id
- `name` (String) RdsCluster database name

### Optional

- `character_set` (String) Character set, default is `utf8mb4`
- `collation` (String) Collation, default is `utf8mb4_unicode_ci`

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
